base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of zora_emerge — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Zora (fish-man) — 3-frame: rising-from-water / head-extended / firing-fireball. Emerges periodically from rivers/ponds. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Zora (fish-man) — 3-frame: rising-from-water / head-extended / firing-fireball. Emerges periodically from rivers/ponds; threatens Link at distance
